STS2CHARTEST-HEAT.title: Heat
STS2CHARTEST-HEAT.description: Lose 20 Heat and gain 1 [gold]Overheat[/gold] when over 20 Heat.
STS2CHARTEST-OVERHEAT.title: Overheat
STS2CHARTEST-OVERHEAT.description: Gain one of three powerful cards for the combat. (Max 3)
STS2CHARTEST-BLAZE.title: Blaze
STS2CHARTEST-BLAZE.description: Trigger Embers on EVERYONE and reduce their Embers by half.
